hero.headline: The Hidden North
hero.subHeadline: A vertical elevation in both geography and cultural depth. Red earth and ancient ridges.

theNyotaLens.architectNote: Laikipia and Samburu represent the frontier of community-led conservation. We focus on helicopter expeditions to the Reteti Sanctuary—a miracle of logistics and empathy.

sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: Encounters with the reticulated giraffe and Grevy’s zebra—species found only above the equator’s red line in this arid paradise.
A private audience with the keepers at Africa’s first community-owned elephant sanctuary. A story of resilience and rescue.
Falling asleep on a raised 'Star Bed' overlooking the Ewaso Nyiro. Architecture without walls, where the Milky Way is your ceiling.

pairsWellWith.reasoning: The descent from the alpine peaks into the arid heat of the desert.
